content.text:
I searched the repository under `/Users/my/.claude/worktrees/agent-a0a13a66/.Trash/my-project 19.06.43/` for keywords related to Gmail, Outlook, Google Calendar, Office 365/Exchange, SMTP/IMAP, and other calendar/email APIs using `grep` and `glob`. The only matches I found were generic mentions (e.g., sections of HTML/CSS containing calendar-related icons or comments about detecting email-looking patterns in `scripts/quality_score.py`), but there are no files, utilities, or documented hooks that implement or integrate with any mail/calendaring services (Gmail/Outlook/Calendar) that could be reused for schedule-summary functionality.
